title: Senior Fleet Manager at Speed Post India

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Speed Post India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Speed Post India! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Speed Post India:
Speed Post India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speed Post India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
